title: Weekly Market Report | Jun 8–12, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+2,111 pts (+3.3%)** this week (64,218 → 66,329).

The average return across all 67 themes was **-2.3%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- SpaceX (SPCX) lists on Nasdaq (June 12): IPO $135, opens at $192.5 (+42.6%)
- $75B raised — largest IPO in history
- US May CPI: Core 3.0% (below 3.1% consensus) → rate cut odds improve
- Middle East tensions: Israel-Lebanon border clash → oil hits $87

---
